zh.lifeSummary: 當Adèle de Nevers於1145年出生在法國布格尼艾福內維斯時，她的母親Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre22歲，父親Guillaume de Nevers117歲。她和Renard de Joigny IV至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1192年在法國布格-福朗-可特艾喬尼享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nevers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from the city of Nevers in France.
Possibly an altered form of English Nevard or perhaps of its extinct variant Neverd. The surname Nevers is also found in Jamaica.

History: The majority of the American bearers of this surname trace their origin to Richard Nevers, born in 1666 in Woburn, MA. His origin is not known, but his surname is also documented in the forms Nevard and Neverds, which make it possible that Richard Nevers was of English origin.

variants.name: Nevard
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Nevard, from ancient Germanic Niwhard, from niw- ‘new’ + hard- ‘strong, hardy’. Compare Nevers .

nameMeanings.name: Adèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

en.lifeSummary: When Adèle de Nevers was born in 1145, in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, her mother, Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre, was 22 and her father, Guillaume de Nevers, was 117. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Renard de Joigny IV. She died in 1192, in Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adèle de Nevers est née en 1145, à Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, sa mère, Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre, avait 22 ans et son père, Guillaume de Nevers, avait 117 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Renard de Joigny IV. Elle est décédée en 1192, à Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adèle de Nevers 1145 in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihre Mutter Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre 22 und ihr Vater Guillaume de Nevers 117. Sie hatte mit Renard de Joigny IV mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1192 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle de Nevers è nata il nel 1145 nel Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, sua madre, Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre, aveva 22 anni e sua padre, Guillaume de Nevers, aveva 117 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Renard de Joigny IV. Morì nel 1192, nel Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adèle de Neversが1145年にフランスボウルゴグンニevアネバーズで生まれた時，母Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerreは22歳，父Guillaume de Neversは117歳であった。彼女はRenard de Joigny IVとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1192年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオンジョイグニーで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adèle de Nevers(이)가 1145년 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 네버스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 어머니 Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Nevers(은)는 117세였다. 그녀는 Renard de Joigny IV(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1192년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 욘 조익니에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle de Nevers nasceu em 1145, em Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França, sua mãe, Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre, tinha 22 anos e seu pai, Guillaume de Nevers, tinha 117 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Renard de Joigny IV. Ela faleceu em 1192, em Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adèle de Nevers родилась в 1145 г. в местности нивирс, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция, её матери по имени Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre было 22 года, а отцу, которого звали Guillaume de Nevers, 117. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Renard de Joigny IV. Она умерла в 1192 г. в местности джоигни, енн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adèle de Nevers nació en 1145, en Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, su mamá, Ida Von Sponheim, Comtess de Nevers et d'Auxerre et Tonnerre, tenía 22 años y su papá, Guillaume de Nevers, tenía 117 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Renard de Joigny IV. Murió en 1192, en Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 47 años.
